data.name: Automatically sign the Release files of this repository.
data.value: 自动为此仓库的 Release 文件签名。

data.name: Controls which binary-{arch}/Packages index files are generated. Packages with non-matching architectures (except 'all') are stored but invisible to apt clients. Also sets the Architectures: line in the client setup guide. Changes take effect on the next Repository Sync job run.
data.value: 控制生成哪些 binary-{arch}/Packages 索引文件。架构不匹配的软件包（'all' 除外）会被存储但对 apt 客户端不可见。同时设置客户端配置指南中的 Architectures: 行。更改将在下一次仓库同步任务运行时生效。

data.name: Controls which component subdirectories are included when generating the Packages index. Packages in unlisted components are stored but invisible to apt clients. Also sets the Components: line in the client setup guide. Changes take effect on the next Repository Sync job run.
data.value: 控制生成 Packages 索引时包含哪些组件子目录。未列出的组件中的包会被存储，但对 apt 客户端不可见。同时设置客户端配置指南中的 Components: 行。更改将在下一次 Repository Sync 作业运行时生效。

data.name: If linked to a mirror, this repository will serve packages from that upstream source.
data.value: 如果链接到镜像，此仓库将提供来自该上游源的软件包。

data.name: The APT suite name (e.g. jammy, stable).
data.value: APT 套件名称（例如 jammy、stable）。

data.name: The GPG key used to sign the Release files of this repository.
data.value: 用于签署此存储库 Release 文件的 GPG 密钥。

data.name: The internal identifier and part of the URL path.
data.value: 内部标识符及 URL 路径的一部分。

data.name: The URL prefix for this repository (e.g. 'ubuntu').
data.value: 此仓库的 URL 前缀（例如 'ubuntu'）。
